( 1) These rules may be called the Railway Claims Tribunal (Financial and Administrative Powers) Amendment Ru 5, 2003. l (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Ollicial Gazette 2. In the Railway Claims Tribunal (Financial and Administrative Powers) Rules, 1989 in fire Schedule,— (1) for the entry against serial number 1, the following entry shall be substituted, namely :—~ “L Appointment on deputation basis against vacancies in respect 3 sanctiorgd posts”; (ii) serial niunber 6 and the entries relating thereto shall be omitted, V [No. 2002/'I‘C(RCT) 3a] PADMAKSHI RAHEJA, Executive Director, Public Grievances Foot note : The principal rules were published vide number G.S.R. 845 (E), dated the 19th September, 1989.
